---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r}
# ── Save just the metadata from the cleaned object ───────────────────────
#meta_clean <- dat_tc4c@meta.data
#write.csv(meta_clean, 
          #file = "dat-til-redo-scdblfinder-metadata-042426.csv")
meta_clean = read.csv("dat-til-redo-post-scdblfinder-042726.csv",row.names = 1)
# ── Use barcodes to subset the original lighter object ───────────────────
# (use whichever pre-doublet-removal object is smallest on disk)
clean_barcodes <- rownames(meta_clean)

dat_tmde1 = qread("dat-til-correct-gen-celltypes-from-arjun-noDC-041526.qs")

dat_tc4_subset <- subset(dat_tmde1, cells = clean_barcodes)

# ── Transfer the scDblFinder metadata columns ─────────────────────────────
dat_tc4_subset$scDblFinder.class <- meta_clean[clean_barcodes, "scDblFinder.class"]
dat_tc4_subset$scDblFinder.score <- meta_clean[clean_barcodes, "scDblFinder.score"]
dat_tc4_subset$decontX_contamination <- meta_clean[clean_barcodes, "decontX_contamination"]

cat("Cells in cleaned object:", ncol(dat_tc4_subset), "\n")

qsave(dat_tc4_subset, 
      file = "dat-til-redo-scdblfinder-doublets-removed-042426-light.qs")
```
